register.subtitle: Create Your Account
register.username_help: 3-100 characters, letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens only
register.email_help_optional: Only used to recover a forgotten password. Skip it if you prefer — but without one you won't be able to reset your password, so keep your password safe or add an email later in your profile.
register.password_help: At least 8 characters with at least one letter and one number
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset link
reset.subtitle: Enter your new password
reset.password_help: At least 8 characters with at least one letter and one number
recovery.warning: Save this code somewhere safe. It is the only way to recover your account if you forget your password, and it will not be shown again.
recovery.code_help: Select the code above and copy it somewhere safe now.
recovery.saved_continue: I've saved it — continue to login
recovery.reset_subtitle: Use your recovery code to set a new password.
recovery.from_forgot_link: No email on your account? Use a recovery code
profile.email_change_help: Changing your email will require re-verification.
profile.preferences_description: Configure your reading, review, text-to-speech, and pagination settings.
profile_single.single_user_mode_html: You are using Lukaisu Server in single-user mode. Account management is available when multi-user mode is enabled.
profile_single.preferences_description: Configure your reading, review, appearance, text-to-speech, and pagination settings.
google_link.title: Link Google Account
google_link.subtitle: An account already exists with this email
google_link.exists_html: An Lukaisu Server account already exists for {email}.
google_link.enter_password: Enter your password to link your Google account, or cancel to go back.
microsoft_link.title: Link Microsoft Account
microsoft_link.exists_html: An account with the email {email} already exists.
microsoft_link.enter_password: Enter your password to link your Microsoft account to your existing Lukaisu Server account.
